name: Local git hooks for pre-commit and pre-push verification
description: Add repository-level Husky hooks so local commits run lint-staged formatting and linting on staged files, local pushes run the existing test suite, and commit messages are validated with commitlint. CI verification remains unchanged as the server-side safety net.
evidence: Installed Husky, lint-staged, commitlint, and root prettier; configured `.husky/pre-commit` to run `pnpm exec lint-staged`, `.husky/pre-push` to run `pnpm test`, and `.husky/commit-msg` to run `pnpm exec commitlint --edit "$1"`. Verified with `./init.sh`, `pnpm exec lint-staged` on staged hook/config files, and `pnpm exec commitlint --edit /tmp/commitlint-msg`.
